persona.name: Aiden Chen
persona.motivations_goals: Win the state chess championship and pursue a career in mathematics
persona.backstory: Child prodigy in mathematics who finds social situations more challenging than complex equations

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the chess club meeting in classroom5. It's important to practice for the upcoming state championship.

actions.dialog_text: Sophia, stay behind me. We need to confront the shooter.
actions.plan: There's an active shooter in the building. I need to confront the shooter to protect myself and others. This is the only viable option now.
The shooter is in the entrance hall. I need to move towards the shooter to confront them directly. This is the only way to stop them.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is nearby. I need to move quickly to confront them before they can harm anyone else.

memories.description: Decided to head to classroom5 for the chess club meeting to practice for the state championship.
Heard a gunshot and decided to confront the shooter to protect myself and others, instructing Sophia to stay behind me.
Decided to move towards the shooter in the entrance hall to confront them directly, as it is the only way to stop them.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, 15.37 meters away. Decided to sprint towards the cafeteria to confront them directly.
